test.name: AUT-WT-LOGIN01: Verify login page loads successfully

kw.name: Open Login Page
Open Browser To Url
Open Browser Session
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Opens a browser session on a blank page and maximizes the window.

kw.name: Go To Url
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.
Navigates the current browser session to the provided URL.
Opens a browser session and navigates to the provided URL.
Opens the login page in a new browser session using the provided URL.

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Close Browser Session
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes all open browser instances for the current execution.

test.name: AUT-WT-LOGIN02: Login with valid username and valid password

kw.name: Open Login Page
Open Browser To Url
Open Browser Session
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Opens a browser session on a blank page and maximizes the window.

kw.name: Go To Url
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.
Navigates the current browser session to the provided URL.
Opens a browser session and navigates to the provided URL.
Opens the login page in a new browser session using the provided URL.

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Input Text When Ready
Wait For Element To Be Ready
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'haklarr' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='User Name']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Waits for an element and then inputs the provided text.

kw.name: Input Text When Ready
Wait For Element To Be Ready
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Waits for an element and then inputs the provided text.

kw.name: Click When Ready
Wait For Element To Be Ready
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Waits for an element and then clicks it.

kw.name: Close Browser Session
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes all open browser instances for the current execution.

test.name: AUT-WT-LOGIN03: Verify login failure with incorrect username and valid password

Open Browser To Url

kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.msg: Typing text ' haklarr ' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='User Name']'.

Waits for an element and then inputs the provided text.

Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.name: AUT-WT-LOGIN10: Verify password field with leading and trailing spaces

kw.name: Open Login Page
Open Browser To Url
Open Browser Session
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Opens a browser session on a blank page and maximizes the window.

kw.name: Go To Url
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.
Navigates the current browser session to the provided URL.
Opens a browser session and navigates to the provided URL.
Opens the login page in a new browser session using the provided URL.

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Input Text When Ready
Wait For Element To Be Ready
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'haklarr' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='User Name']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Waits for an element and then inputs the provided text.

kw.name: Input Text When Ready
Wait For Element To Be Ready
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

Waits for an element and then clicks it.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Close Browser Session
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes all open browser instances for the current execution.

test.name: AUT-WT-LOGIN17: Verify login submission using keyboard Enter key

kw.name: Open Login Page
Open Browser To Url
Open Browser Session
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Opens a browser session on a blank page and maximizes the window.

kw.name: Go To Url
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.
Navigates the current browser session to the provided URL.
Opens a browser session and navigates to the provided URL.
Opens the login page in a new browser session using the provided URL.

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled

kw.msg: Typing text 'haklarr' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='User Name']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Waits for an element and then inputs the provided text.

Wait For Element To Be Ready
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Waits for an element and then inputs the provided text.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Pressing special key ENTER to element.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Close Browser Session
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes all open browser instances for the current execution.

Opens the login page in a new browser session using the provided URL.
